entity.label: Kerioth
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A city of Moab (Jer. 48:24, 41), called Kirioth (Amos 2:2).

nodes.label: Kerioth
nodes.description: A city of Moab (Jer. 48:24, 41), called Kirioth (Amos 2:2).

verses.text: And upon Kerioth, and upon Bozrah, and upon all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.
But I will send a fire upon Moab, and it shall devour the palaces of Kerioth: and Moab shall die with tumult, with shouting, and with the sound of the trumpet:
